banner:
Welcome to the Interactive Learning Booth

Choose a hands-on guide below to explore Grafana 13 features at your own pace. Each guide opens in a new tab with step-by-step interactive instructions.

rules.title: Tour of Grafana 13 Features (Play)
rules.description: Hands-on tour of Grafana 13 features running on Play. Explore the latest capabilities with live examples on Grafana Play.

rules.title: Tour of Grafana 13 Features (Cloud)
rules.description: Hands-on tour of Grafana 13 features on a Grafana Cloud instance. Explore the latest capabilities in a full cloud environment.

rules.title: BI in Grafana: Semantic Layer
rules.description: Interactive demo of how BI dashboards are enhanced by a Semantic Layer, covering cross-filtering, generated SQL, time-range filtering, and automatic JOINs.
